shakshi: King Bombastus met the player — the legitimate sovereign, operating on curated incomplete information
The player accepted Bombastus's mission to gather intel on the Fae court and find Hypatia
Bombastus is on board with the war but taking a diplomatic approach first while gathering intel — lost as to what is actually happening
Queen Hildegarde is against the war — first named context for her position, the royal family is internally fractured
The player told Bombastus something is being built to hurt Amelia — all they could say without technological context
The player warned Bombastus that something stinks about Nexiott and Saffron
Bombastus did not act on the warning — the player did the right thing and it bounced
Kelly controls what Bombastus knows and can handle — the player may sense this but cannot name it yet
Bombastus believes Hypatia is in the Faewilds — the player knows this is wrong but cannot correct it without revealing more than they have
The player is now officially gathering intelligence for the king alongside everything else they are carrying
